User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the Zee 4 application.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user (Firebase Auth UID).

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short bio about the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the user was created.

followingCount.description: Number of users this user is following.

Tweet.title: Tweet
Tweet.description: A post/tweet created by a user.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The profile picture of the author.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the tweet was created.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: A record of a user liking a tweet.

userId.description: The UID of the user who liked the tweet.

tweetId.description: The ID of the liked tweet.

Retweet.title: Retweet
Retweet.description: A record of a user retweeting a tweet.

userId.description: The UID of the user who retweeted.

tweetId.description: The ID of the retweeted tweet.

Follow.title: Follow
Follow.description: A record of a user following another user.

followerId.description: The UID of the user who is following.

followingId.description: The UID of the user being followed.

likes/{likeId}.description: Stores all likes. Document ID is usually {userId}_{tweetId}.

retweets/{retweetId}.description: Stores all retweets. Document ID is usually {userId}_{tweetId}.

follows/{followId}.description: Stores all follow relationships. Document ID is usually {followerId}_{followingId}.
